title: Bostik Blu Stick Glue Sticks 4 x 8g - Goes on Blue - Dries Clear - Solvent Free - Washable
features: Bostik Blu Stick is a glue stick that goes on blue and dries clear
Solvent free, odourless and easy to use, UKCA and CE approved
Ideal for sticking most paper-based materials, For both home and school use
Washable formulation, Easy to clean up
Contents: 1x Bostik Blu Stick Glue Sticks, Goes on Blue, Dries Clear, Solvent Free, Washable, 4 x 8g sticks
Solvent-free, clean and easy to use solid glue stick
Ideal for sticking most paper and card
Ideal for school, home and office
Goes on blue but dries clear
description: From the manufacturer Bostik Blu Stick Blue glue in a stick, which dries clear Bostik Blu Stick goes on blue, so you can see where you are sticking, then dries clear! The glue is solvent free, clean and very easy to use. Bostik Blu Stick is UKCA and CE approved, making it ideal for use in both schools and at home. Bostik Blu Stick has been formulated to be washable so accidental messes can easily be cleaned up. Suitable materials Ideal for use on most paper based materials including card, crepe, tissue paper and photographs. Advantages at a glance: Bostik Blu Stick Goes on blue, dries clear Ideal for sticking most paper and card Suitable for home or school use Washable and easy to clean Pack contains 4 x 8g sticks Bostik
